testcase.name: test_keto_day1_carbs_under_50g

failure.message: AssertionError: ❌ KETO COMPLIANCE FAILED: Day 1 carbs = 127.0g, exceeds 50g limit! is_low_carb=True bypass is NOT working. Check scale_day_to_targets() in server.py. assert 127.0 < 50

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_review_request_fixes.py:307: in test_keto_day1_carbs_under_50g assert total_carbs < 50, ( E AssertionError: ❌ KETO COMPLIANCE FAILED: Day 1 carbs = 127.0g, exceeds 50g limit! is_low_carb=True bypass is NOT working. Check scale_day_to_targets() in server.py. E assert 127.0 < 50
